meta.title: AI Tech Talking-Head Overlay Component System
meta.brief: A visual mood board for Remotion overlay effects that sit above talking-head AI technology videos.
meta.business: AI 科技类博主 Remotion 视频特效体系
meta.goal: Turn six talking-head overlay component families into a unified but diverse visual specification focused on screen position, visual form, and motion character.
meta.audience: Viewers interested in AI tools, technology trends, product launches, practical methods, and industry judgment.
notes: Each tile is one single visual reference image: one talking-head frame plus one primary overlay component family.
Do not create live-action brand mood imagery, product photography, collage, grid, or mini mood board.
No readable text, no logos, no fake source facts, no fake metrics, no real UI data.
Preserve central presenter safety and bottom subtitle safety.

layout: no ordinary component inside presenter safety zone
visualLanguage: minimal placeholder bars instead of readable text

items.title: Source Evidence Dock - Left Sidebar
items.caption: A traceable-source panel lives in the side lane, with a small anchor cue and no factual text.
items.source: Component family: 来源证据 Dock
items.motif: left glass sidebar, source anchor dot, compact placeholder bars, central presenter safety
items.palette: charcoal black, white strokes, restrained cyan, muted gold
items.prompt: Single clean motion-design frame for an AI technology talking-head video, 16:9. A neutral abstract presenter silhouette is centered, with a dashed presenter-safe zone and a calm empty bottom subtitle-safe band. A dark translucent glass source-evidence dock floats in the left side lane only, with thin white strokes, abstract placeholder bars, a small cyan source anchor dot, and one muted gold corner marker. No readable text, no logos, no real web page, no fake data, no real person face, no collage, no split panels, no purple-blue AI template styling.

items.title: Source Evidence Dock - Collapsed Strip
items.caption: The evidence component can collapse into a narrow strip after the source cue has been established.
items.source: Component family: 来源证据 Dock
items.motif: narrow source strip, side rail, minimized evidence card, clean negative space
items.palette: black glass, white, cyan, warm gold
items.prompt: Single visual reference image of a 16:9 AI talking-head video frame with a centered abstract presenter silhouette and protected bottom subtitle band. Show a narrow collapsed source-evidence strip attached to the right edge, dark glass material, thin white outline, tiny cyan tick marks, and a muted gold source pin, suggesting a precise collapse motion after verification. No readable text, no logos, no factual claims, no fake browser content, no collage, no real photography mood board, no purple-blue gradient.

items.title: Physical Card Stack - Step Cards
items.caption: Method or checklist content appears as tangible cards with subtle depth and safe-zone discipline.
items.motif: stacked matte cards, precise cut-in posture, side lane composition
items.palette: charcoal, warm white, cyan edge, muted gold highlight
items.prompt: Single polished motion-design frame for a talking-head AI tutorial video, 16:9. A neutral presenter silhouette stays centered, with an empty subtitle-safe band at the bottom. On the left and right side lanes, a small stack of matte dark glass information cards floats with physical depth, staggered shadows, thin white edges, one cyan edge line, and one muted gold active-card marker. Use abstract placeholder bars only, no readable text, no logo, no collage, no UI screenshot, no purple-blue AI template.

items.title: Physical Card Stack - Conclusion Snap
items.caption: A single conclusion card lands beside the speaker, clean enough to support one spoken idea.
items.motif: one main card, hard-stop motion trace, subtle depth, safe presenter gap
items.palette: black, white, warm gold, minimal cyan
items.prompt: Single 16:9 visual reference frame showing a centered abstract talking-head presenter silhouette and a large empty bottom subtitle-safe band. One dark translucent conclusion card has just snapped into the right side lane with a faint motion trace and a hard-stop shadow, thin white outline, muted gold accent bar, minimal cyan detail, and abstract non-readable placeholder marks. Clean negative space, no text, no logos, no real person, no collage, no corporate slide style, no purple-blue gradient.

items.title: Model Structure Overlay - Agent Pipeline
items.caption: Nodes and lines explain an Agent flow without pretending to be a factual architecture diagram.
items.source: Component family: 模型结构浮层
items.motif: nodes, growing connector lines, highlighted route, presenter-centered frame
items.prompt: Single motion-graphics reference frame for an AI technology talking-head video, 16:9. Centered abstract presenter silhouette with protected central safety zone and empty bottom subtitle band. Around the side lanes, a minimal agent-pipeline overlay of small dark glass nodes and thin cyan connector lines grows around the presenter without covering the face area. One node glows muted gold as the current step. No readable labels, no logos, no fake architecture facts, no dense HUD, no collage, no purple-blue AI template.

items.title: Model Structure Overlay - Feedback Loop
items.caption: A loop diagram visualizes input, reasoning, action, and feedback as abstract side-lane motion.
items.source: Component family: 模型结构浮层
items.motif: looping thin lines, abstract nodes, side-lane architecture
items.palette: black glass, cyan, white, tiny gold accent
items.prompt: Single clean 16:9 overlay-design frame for an AI creator's talking-head video. Show a neutral centered presenter silhouette, clear presenter-safe zone, and empty subtitle-safe band. A minimal feedback-loop structure floats mostly in the left upper and right upper lanes: dark glass nodes, thin cyan arcs, sparse white ticks, one tiny muted gold active point. Abstract and source-neutral, no readable text, no logos, no real UI, no fake metrics, no collage, no purple-blue gradient.

items.title: Scanline Callout - UI Focus Box
items.caption: A scanning line reveals one focused area and one nearby annotation card.
items.motif: horizontal scan line, focus rectangle, single annotation card
items.palette: charcoal, white, cyan scan, muted gold marker
items.prompt: Single high-fidelity motion-design frame for an AI product analysis talking-head video, 16:9. A centered abstract presenter silhouette stays clear, with a bottom subtitle-safe band left empty. A cyan scanline crosses the upper side lanes, revealing one thin focus rectangle on the left and one compact dark glass annotation card on the right. Use only abstract placeholder bars, no readable text, no real product UI, no logos, no fake data, no collage, no cyberpunk purple-blue styling.

items.title: Scanline Callout - Parameter Reveal
items.caption: A technical detail is isolated by a scan sweep and short-lived side annotation.
items.motif: vertical scan sweep, small measurement ticks, compact callout
items.prompt: Single 16:9 visual reference image of a talking-head AI technology video overlay. Centered presenter silhouette, protected central safe area, and empty bottom subtitle band. A vertical cyan scan sweep has revealed a small parameter focus zone in the left side lane, with fine measurement ticks and a compact dark glass callout card near it, one muted gold emphasis dot. No readable text, no numbers, no logos, no actual software UI, no collage, no purple-blue template look.

items.title: Tool Comparison Balance
items.caption: Two tool options sit left and right, while the presenter remains the judge in the center.
items.source: Component family: 工具对比天平
items.motif: left-right panels, central balance line, conclusion emphasis
items.prompt: Single clean motion-design frame for an AI tool review talking-head video, 16:9. Centered abstract presenter silhouette remains unobstructed, bottom subtitle-safe band empty. Two balanced dark glass comparison panels float symmetrically in the left and right side lanes, connected by a thin central balance line that does not cover the presenter. One panel has a muted gold edge to suggest conclusion, the other has cyan technical ticks. Abstract placeholder bars only, no readable text, no logos, no scores, no fake product names, no collage.

items.title: Tool Comparison Route Choice
items.caption: A route-choice variant shows two paths and a highlighted recommendation without long tables.
items.source: Component family: 工具对比天平
items.motif: two route cards, thin path line, recommendation glow
items.prompt: Single 16:9 overlay reference frame for an AI technology talking-head video. A neutral presenter silhouette is centered with safety zone visible and bottom subtitle band empty. Two route-choice cards float on opposite side lanes with thin white outlines, abstract bars, cyan path lines, and one muted gold recommendation glow; no big table, no dense text. No readable words, no logos, no fake metrics, no real UI, no collage, no purple-blue AI template.

items.title: Claim Deconstruction - Three Layers
items.caption: A claim breaks into assertion, support, and risk layers around the speaker.
items.source: Component family: 观点拆解浮层
items.motif: quote block, three horizontal layers, risk accent, presenter as narrator
items.palette: charcoal, white, muted gold, restrained red, cyan
items.prompt: Single editorial motion-design frame for an AI industry judgment talking-head video, 16:9. Centered abstract presenter silhouette remains clear, bottom subtitle-safe band empty. A dark glass quote-like block floats in the left side lane without readable text; on the right, three short horizontal analytical layers appear as abstract bars: muted gold for claim, cyan for support, restrained red for risk. No words, no logos, no real person face, no fake evidence, no collage, no corporate deck.

items.title: Claim Deconstruction - Risk Pin
items.caption: Risk and caveat are made visible as a precise pin, not a dramatic alarm graphic.
items.source: Component family: 观点拆解浮层
items.motif: claim panel, risk pin, side-lane hierarchy, restrained alert color
items.palette: black glass, white, muted gold, restrained red, subtle cyan
items.prompt: Single 16:9 visual reference frame of a talking-head AI commentary video overlay. A centered abstract presenter silhouette is protected by an empty central safety zone and bottom subtitle-safe band. One dark glass claim panel floats on the left side lane with abstract placeholder marks; a small restrained red risk pin and a muted gold caveat marker appear on the right side lane, precise and sober, not alarmist. No readable text, no logos, no fake facts, no collage, no purple-blue gradient, no corporate training look.
